semantic.role: Defines AST extraction patterns for C/C++ source code analysis
responsibilities: Define how to identify include directives as source imports
Define how to extract function definitions, class/struct definitions, namespace definitions, and template classes as exported symbols
Define how to detect function calls, scoped accesses (::), and method calls (.) as usages
outOfScope: Does not cover C++ specific language features like lambdas, constexpr, or advanced template metaprogramming
Does not define extraction of macros, preprocessor directives beyond includes, or attribute annotations
Does not specify any architectural rules, naming conventions, or project-specific policies

English.purpose: This document specifies the AST extraction rules for C/C++ languages used by the ArchSpine system to parse and index source code symbols.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for developers and AI agents who need to understand how C/C++ code is analyzed for import detection, symbol export, and usage tracking within the ArchSpine knowledge graph.
key_takeaways: Defines how to extract include declarations as imports
Defines how to extract functions, classes, structs, namespaces, and template classes as exports with their names and signatures
Defines three usage patterns: function calls, scoped access (::), and method calls (.)

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 该文档定义了 ArchSpine 系统中用于解析和索引 C/C++ 源代码符号的 AST 提取规则。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 适用于需要了解如何分析 C/C++ 代码以实现导入检测、符号导出和使用跟踪的开发者和 AI 代理，帮助构建 ArchSpine 知识图谱。
key_takeaways: 定义了如何将 include 声明提取为导入项
定义了如何将函数、类、结构体、命名空间和模板类提取为导出项，包括它们的名称和签名
定义了三种使用模式：函数调用、作用域访问（::）和方法调用（.）
